description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly white upper with gold abstract patterns and accents. The shoe has a robust, chunky black sole with pronounced tread and sculpted sidewalls, providing both style and support. Black laces run through reinforced eyelets, and the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. The gold pattern appears to be a stylized, possibly graffiti-inspired motif, wrapping around the heel and sides. The heel counter and toe cap are reinforced, suggesting durability for urban use. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for streetwear or casual athletic activities.
description: A modern high-top sneaker with a white and gold patterned upper, black laces, and a chunky black sole. The design is bold and urban, with reinforced heel and toe areas.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the gold patterned upper, black laces, and the sculpted black sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black laces, padded tongue, and perforated toe box.
description_view_2: Right side view with similar gold patterning and the prominent black sole.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded collar, gold pattern wrapping around the heel, and the solid black heel counter.
